stimulus: The share of the world’s population living in cities has increased dramatically since 1970, but this change has not been uniform. Germany, for example, was already heavily urbanized in 1970, with more than 70% of the population living in cities. The main contributors to the world’s urbanization since 1970 have been countries like Indonesia, whose population went from ______blank
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the table to complete the assertion?

answerOptions.content: around 40% urban in 1970 to around 80% urban in 2020.
less than 30% urban in 1970 to around 80% urban in 2020.
less than 10% urban in 1970 to more than 50% urban in 2020.
less than 20% urban in 1970 to more than 50% urban in 2020.

rationale: Choice D is the best answer. According to the table, Indonesia’s urban share was 17% in 1970 (less than 20%) and 57% in 2020 (more than 50%). Choice A is incorrect because Indonesia was not around 40% urban in 1970 (that figure describes South Korea). Choice B is incorrect because Indonesia’s 2020 figure is 57%, not around 80%. Choice C is incorrect because Indonesia was at 17% in 1970, which is greater than 10%.
